recipes.title: Captioned social video
recipes.intent: Build a vertical short-form video with hook text, synced captions, audio visuals, and CTA.
recipes.prompt: Create a 9:16 captioned social clip using RemotionUI. Install the components first, import them from local source paths, and use Remotion Caption[] data for synced captions.

recipes.title: Data story
recipes.intent: Build a chart-led explainer video with animated metrics and timeline context.
recipes.prompt: Create a data-story Remotion video using RemotionUI. Convert the user's data into typed arrays and keep each scene focused on one readable insight.

recipes.title: Podcast clip
recipes.intent: Build an audio-first clip with waveform visuals and synced captions.
recipes.prompt: Create a podcast clip using RemotionUI. Ask for an audio source and captions, then use audio visuals and safe-area captions.

recipes.title: Product intro
recipes.intent: Build a polished product intro or feature showcase.
recipes.prompt: Create a product intro using RemotionUI. Start with a short headline, reveal the product or logo, show key features, and end with a CTA.

recipes.title: Lower-third scene
recipes.intent: Build a lower third, speaker label, title card, stat card, or quote overlay.
recipes.prompt: Create a reusable scene overlay using RemotionUI. Reserve layout slots and keep text readable instead of manually stacking elements.
